titleStmt.title: SII 38.551: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 551. (A.R. No. 551 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall of the Nīrvaṇṇar perumāḷ shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravartti Vīrarājēndra (Rājarāja III) Year 2; Siṁha, śu. di. 2. Attam, Friday = 25th August 1245 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Nīrvaṇṇaṉ of the temple at Tirunīrmalai by four persons, Śārumbam Nandi Pallavaraiyaṉ, Kambakkōṉ Bhaṭṭaṉ alias Nīlagaṅgaraiyakkōṉ, Eṭṭisipākkadātan and another person (name damaged). Two shepherds, Tiruvagattikkōṉ, (a resident) of Irumbuliyūr and Aṇṇāmalai Añjal alias Perumāḷ, received 16 cows each and had agreed to measure out 1/4 āḻākku and 1 uḻakku of oil daily for burning the perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ virarājendracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2vatu simhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum peṟṟa Atta
tti nāḷ tirunirmalai nāyanār nirvaṇṇanukku tiruvi nuntā viḷakku + Ittiruviḷakku Oṉṟil kāmakkoṉ makaṉSome over-writing is seen till the end of this line. cārumpaṉ nanti
nampi pallavaraiyaṉ viḷakku 2 10 4m kampakkoṉ paṭṭanāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyakkoṉ viḷakku 2 10 4m tirumāḷakkoṉ makaṉ Eṭṭici pākkatātan viḷakku 2 10 4m pāruma
vaitta viḷakku ña 2 10 4m Āka tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu 32 Ippacu muppattiraṇṭil Irumpuliyūril maṉṟāṭi kāmakkoṉ makaṉ tiruvakattik
koṉ viḷakku 5kku kaikkoṇṭa pacu 10 6m tirunilaiyil maṉṟāṭi perāyirak koṉ makaṉ Aṇṇāmalai Añculeṉṟa perumāḷ viḷakku 5kku kaikkoṇṭa pacu
10 6m Āka pacu muppattiraṇṭuṅ koṇṭu tirunantāviḷakku +kku nāḷ+kku kāle Uḻakku ney koyilile Aḷakka kaṭavomākavum tevaikuṭimaiyum
ceytu Ittirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttuvatāka kaikkoṇṭom tiruvakattikkoṉum Añcaleṉṟa perumāḷk koṉum Ivvi
ruvom Ittiruvakattikkoṉ kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku 5m Iañcaleṉṟa perumāḷ tampi celvaṉ kaikkoṇṭa viḷakku kāl Ivaṉ tampi vaṭukaṉ
kaik koṇṭa viḷakku kālvekati Araiyum kaikkoṇṭu m Ic cata m Ivviruvom §
Digital edition of SII 38.551 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
